summary: Full E2E click-through completed for all 4 flows. Backend pytest: 76 passed + 1 skipped (baseline confirmed). New DELETE /api/operator/deploy/{project_id} verified end-to-end via new test_p6_2_operator_delete_audit.py: writes audit row with action='deploy_project.delete' and details.via='operator_ui' (also 404 on unknown id). Frontend: (1) Marketing tab save round-trip renders 'E2E TEST BANNER' on / and /pricing, dismiss button hides it, disabling+saving clears it publicly. (2) Operator Messaging 'Send reminder' fired toast '2FA reminder sent to 61 users', API returned {ok:true,sent:63}; freshly registered user (test_bell2_*) saw bell badge=1 with aria-label='Notifications (1 unread)', popover showed subject '2FA Setup Reminder' + CTA 'Set up 2FA now' (data-testid='notification-cta-...') linking to /setup-2fa; Mark all read cleared the badge to 0. (3) Audit 'Project deletions' chip filtered table from 29→11 rows all of action 'Project deleted' (deploy_project.delete), chip became rose-styled (border-rose-500/bg-rose-500/20/text-rose-200); Clear restored 29 rows of mixed actions.

issues: Quick-Guide tour DialogOverlay intercepts pointer-events for the notifications bell on a first-time user. Bell is unreachable until 'Skip' is clicked. This is the same pattern as the operator console — consider auto-suppressing the tour or moving the bell above z-index of the overlay so notifications are always reachable.

action_items: (Optional UX) Make notifications-bell pointer-events:auto / z-index above the dashboard tour DialogOverlay so first-time users can open their bell without dismissing the tour first.
critical_code_review_comments: deploy_projects_ext.py:516 op_delete_project — audit row correctly captures projectName, repo, domain, last_deployment_url and via='operator_ui'. Wrapped in try/except so audit failure never breaks the delete (good defensive pattern). 404 on unknown id verified.
audit_ext.py:64 list_audit — exact-match action filter + actor regex; returns {'total','rows','distinct_actions'} (tests must use 'rows' not 'items').

notifications_ext.py:209 /operator/notify/2fa-reminder — non-idempotent campaign semantics confirmed (each call writes fresh docs). Audience query excludes the operator (role='user' + totp_enabled !== true).
AuditTab.jsx quick-filter chip — uses controlled state + setActionFilter('deploy_project.delete'); active class adds border-rose-500/bg-rose-500/20/text-rose-200; Clear resets all filters. ✓
MarketingBanner.jsx — localStorage key 'tbc.marketingBanner.dismissedHash' correctly hides banner per-content-hash so dismiss is sticky-per-message but new messages re-show.
(Pre-existing minor) Dashboard tour DialogOverlay intercepts pointer events for the bell until 'Skip' — not a blocker but worth a polish pass.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_p6_2_operator_delete_audit.py (new — 2 tests: audit row creation with via=operator_ui + 404 on unknown id)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 3 UI flows passed end-to-end on real preview URL)

test_credentials: Operator rac.investments.swe@gmail.com / 123Admin@98. Created fresh user test_bell2_1781343345@test.com / BellTest@123 for FLOW 2 inbox verification.
seed_data_creation: Created 4 TEST_del_* deploy_projects then deleted them via the new endpoint (audit trail intact and shown by audit table). Created 2 test_bell_*@test.com users for notification inbox verification. Marketing banner cleaned up (enabled:false) at end of FLOW 1.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 flows from review_request iteration_8 pass. Two pre-existing UX caveats to remember: (a) operator route hits /setup-2fa after login because RESET_OPERATOR_PASSWORD=true keeps TOTP cleared — the session cookie is still valid for /api/* so all flows work, just navigate manually to /operator after login. (b) Both /operator and /dashboard show a one-time Quick-Guide tour modal that intercepts pointer events — always click 'Skip tour'/'Skip' before interacting with bell/tabs in a fresh session. /signup is not a route — use /register or POST /api/auth/register directly.
